rulings.Case Title: 560 HAIGHT STREET HOMEOWNERS ASSOCIATION INC A VS. 560 HAIGHT STREET, LLC A CALIFORNIA LIMITED
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Thursday, February 10, 2011, line 2, DEFENDANT GEORGE BIRMINGHAM, THE BIRMINGHAM GROUP, INC. AMENDED DEMURRER TO 2ND AMENDED COMPLAINT. THE DEMURRER AND MOTION TO STRIKE ARE MOOT AS TO THE BIRMINGHAM GROUP INC. PLAINTIFF CONCEDES THAT IT IS NOT PLEADING THE CONCEALMENT CAUSE OF ACTION AGAINST BUILDER DEFENDANTS SUCH AS THE BIRMINGHAM GROUP INC. THE DEMURRER IS OVERRULED AND THE MOTION TO STRIKE IS DENIED AS TO GEORGE BIRMINGHAM. =(302/LMG)

rulings.Case Title: SIMMONDS & NARITA, LLP, A LIMITED LIABILITY VS. KENOSIAN & MIELE, LLP A LIMITED LIABILITY et al
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Thursday, February 10, 2011, line 3, DEFENDANT KENOSIAN & MIELE, LLP'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT. DEFENDANT'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT IS DENIED. THE COURT FINDS THAT THERE ARE TRIABLE ISSUES OF FACT RE 1)WHETHER DEFENDANT HAS IN FACT PAID ALL THE BILLS RELATED TO THE FEDERAL ACTION; 2)THE TERMS OF THE PARTIES' AGREEMENT; AND 3)WHETHER PLAINTIFF'S CONDUCT IN THE STATE COURT ACTION BENEFITED DEFENDANT. =(302/LMG)

rulings.Case Title: HUNTER LABORAORIES INC., VS. JESSE FIERRO et al
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Thursday, February 10, 2011, line 18, DEFENDANT JESSE FIERRO'S DEMURRER TO SECOND AMENDED COMPLAINT. DEFENDANT'S DEMURRER IS SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND AS TO THE 1ST CAUSE OF ACTION REFERENCE TO ANY ALLEGED BREACH OF CONTRACT BASEd ON USE OF PLAINTIFF'S CONFIDENTIAL INFORMATION. DEMURRER TO 1ST CAUSE OF ACTION ON OTHER GROUNDS OVERRULED. DEFENDANT'S DEMURRER TO 2ND CAUSE OF ACTION IS SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND AS TO FRAUD ALLEGATIONS SET FORTH AT PARAGRAPHS 27-29 OF THE SECOND AMENDED COMPLAINT. THE DEMURRER IS OVERRULED ON ALL OTHER GROUNDS. =(302/LMG)

rulings.Case Title: KIM KREIS et al VS. AMERICAN MULTI-CINEMA INC. et al
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Thursday, February 10, 2011, line 17, DEFENDANT AMERICAN MULTI-CINEMA INC., AMC ENTERTAINMENT, INC.'S MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT. THE MOTION TO STRIKE AS TO THE PUNITIVE DAMAGES IS GRANTED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND. PLAINTIFFS MUST PLEAD A SUFFICIENT FACTUAL BASIS TO SHOW THAT DEFENDANT ACTED WITH THE REQUISITE MALICE. THE MOTION TO STRIKE AS TO THE 2ND CAUSE OF ACTION WILLFUL FAILURE TO WARN IS GRANTED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND. =(302/LMG)

rulings.Case Title: POTRERO MEDIA CORPORATION, A CALIFORNIA CORPORATIO VS. MATTHEW JONES et al
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Thursday, February 10, 2011, line 6, CROSS-DEFENDANT POTRERO MEDIA CORPORATION, A CALIFORNIA CORPORATIO MOTION TO STRIKE CROSS-COMPLAINT. MOTION TO STRIKE GRANTED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND THE PRAYER FOR PUNITIVE DAMAGES TO THE EXTENT THAT THE REQUEST ARISES UNDER THE 9TH AND 10TH CAUSES OF ACTION. GRANTED AS TO THE ALLEGATIONS REFERRING TO "OTHERS SIMILARLY SITUATED". DENIED AS TO THE PRAYER FOR ATTORNEYS FEE'S UNDER CCC 1021.5. =(302/LMG)

rulings.Case Title: POTRERO MEDIA CORPORATION, A CALIFORNIA CORPORATIO VS. MATTHEW JONES et al
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Thursday, February 10, 2011, line 6, CROSS-DEFENDANT POTRERO MEDIA CORPORATION, A CALIFORNIA CORPORATIO DEMURRER TO CROSS-COMPLAINT. DEMURRER TO CROSS-COMPLAINT IS SUSTAINED IN PART AND OVERRULED IN PART. AS TO 1ST CAUSE OF ACTION, DEMURRER SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND. PLAINTIFF MUST CLARIFY WHAT THE TERMS OF THE CONTRACT ARE AND THE RELATIONSHIP OF THOSE TERMS TO THE ALLEGED BREACH. AS TO THE 2ND, 5TH AND 6TH CAUSES OF ACTION THE DEMURRER IS OVERRULED. =(302/LMG)
